ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player this statistic belongs to */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Games started */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Minutes per game */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3fgm" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "3fga" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "3fg_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated return date for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training schedule record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of the training */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_schedules_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player on the team (e.g., Guard, Forward)
Reference to the team the player belongs to
Round in which the player was drafted
Number of years of professional experience
Start date of the current contract
End date of the current contract
Unique identifier for each statistic record
Reference to the player this statistic belongs to
Location of the game (home or away)
City where the team is based
State where the team is based
Location of the game (home or away)
Unique identifier for each injury record

Unique identifier for each training schedule record
